query:
UPDATE unitPendingQueue upq
JOIN receivingOrders ro ON ro.id = upq.receivingOrderId
SET upq.tenantId = ro.tenantId
WHERE upq.tenantId = 1
  AND ro.tenantId IS NOT NULL
  AND ro.tenantId != 1;

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS pending_queue_corrigidas;
